latin: Parvulus homo in mundum subterraneum cecidit. quamquam multa pericula aderant, constantia eum implebat. cor eius determinatione plenum erat.

questions.prompt: Where did the small human fall?
What fills the human despite the dangers?

translation: A small human fell into an underground world. Although many dangers were present, determination filled them. Their heart was full of determination.
